title: MoneyTracker
body:
/mt transactions: Shows all tracked money or vote point related transactions with the exception of /sell all and /sell hand

/mt totals: Shows total earned, total sell all earned, total spent, net change.

/mt topsources: Shows your highest expendatures and income soruces.

/mt stats: Shows how many total transactions have been logged, largest transaction logged, and most frequent transaction.

/mt sellall: Shows every /sell all and /sell hand event.

/mt search: Allows you to search all of your transactions to find specific ones.

**If you are crashing or getting kicked, its not the mod. You have the wrong requirements installed or are not on 1.21.3 Fabric.**

Correct 1.21.3 Cloth Version Download: https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/16.0.143+fabric

Correct 1.21.3 FabricAPI Version Download: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.114.0+1.21.3

Correct 1.21.3 Fabric Language Kotlin Download: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.13.1+kotlin.2.1.10

Correct 1.21.3 ModMenu Version Download: https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/12.0.0
